name: Albutrepenonacog Alfa
description: Albutrepenonacog Alfa is a recombinant fusion protein linking Coagulation Factor IX with Albumin (rIX-FP)). CSL Behring developed this drug for their product Idelvion.
indication: Idelvion was designated as an orphan medicinal product by the European Medicines Agency in the following indication: treatment of haemophilia B.
